note: Falsifiable visual questions for the future multimodal judge (verify-and-evals.md §2.5, §3.5). Unused until the judge lands (phase 6/7). Motion is checked mechanically at rung 5; these cover static appearance.

questions.ask: Is exactly one of the three segments visually emphasized (the selected one)?
Is the indicator positioned behind the 'General' segment?
Is any segment label clipped or overflowing its segment?
Is the indicator positioned behind the 'Advanced' segment?
Does the content area's text refer to the Advanced pane?
